summary: Bottom tab bar bug fix VERIFIED on Expo web preview (mobile viewport 375x667). All 5 tabs (Jaap, Tracker, Videos, Insights, Settings) are tappable and correctly navigate to their target screens. Executed 3 tap sequences: (1) in-order Jaap‚ÜíTracker‚ÜíVideos‚ÜíInsights‚ÜíSettings ‚Äî 5/5 pass; (2) rapid alternating Jaap‚ÜíVideos‚ÜíTracker‚ÜíSettings‚ÜíInsights ‚Äî 5/5 pass; (3) double-tap same tab (Jaap, Videos) ‚Äî no screen breakage. Active-tint check with Videos active: Videos label color = rgb(229, 122, 0) = brandPrimary, other four labels = rgb(140, 122, 107) = muted ‚Äî correct highlight behaviour. Content not hidden: on Jaap screen the stat cards (Today/Streak/Lifetime) bottom=595px sit above tab-bar top=607px (12px gap on 667px viewport ‚Äî clear). Regression: /write route reached from Jaap header pencil and /video-admin route reached from Videos '+' button; go-back returns to the correct tab and all 5 tabs still work post-regression. testID props on Tabs.Screen (tab-jaap, tab-tracker, tab-videos, tab-insights, tab-settings) DO NOT propagate to DOM on RN Web (known limitation confirmed in iteration_2 note) ‚Äî used get_by_text label fallback as advised. No red-screen errors. Two pre-existing non-blocking console warnings noticed: (a) props.pointerEvents deprecated (celebrate view in index.tsx:297), (b) Invalid DOM property `transform-origin` (should be transformOrigin) ‚Äî unrelated to tab fix.

issues: On web preview with 0 bottom safe-area inset, tab-bar total height is only 60px and labels sit at y‚âà653 on a 667px viewport (~14px from bottom edge). Adequate but tight. On real Android/iOS with insets the padding correctly grows via insets.bottom.

react_native_issues.issue: Uses deprecated `pointerEvents` prop instead of `style.pointerEvents`. Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Reference: /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/index.tsx:297
Invalid DOM property `transform-origin` ‚Äî should be `transformOrigin` (camelCase). Pre-existing warning, likely from a StyleSheet.create somewhere. Not user-blocking.

`tabBarTestID` on Tabs.Screen is NOT emitted as data-testid on web preview. Test scripts must fall back to visible label. Consider setting testID on a wrapping element or filing upstream expo-router web tracking issue.

action_items: (Optional) Replace `pointerEvents="none"` on the celebrate <Animated.View> in /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/index.tsx:297 with `style={{ pointerEvents: 'none' }}` (or the shared style) to silence the RN Web deprecation warning.
(Optional) Grep the codebase for `transform-origin` and rename to `transformOrigin` to silence the Invalid DOM property warning on web.

(Optional) On tabBar labels being close to the bottom edge on web (14px margin), consider bumping `barContentHeight` to 64 or increasing tabBarLabelStyle.marginBottom slightly for better breathing room on desktop/web preview.
critical_code_review_comments: (tabs)/_layout.tsx correctly uses useSafeAreaInsets() and adds Math.max(insets.bottom, 8) for Android ‚Äî fixes the reported gesture-bar overlap.
tabBarHideOnKeyboard: true added ‚Äî good UX on Android when TextInput opens keyboard.
tabBarAccessibilityLabel is set per tab ‚Äî improves a11y.
tabBarTestID is set but does not propagate on web ‚Äî not a bug, but limits Playwright testing on web preview (documented in iteration_2).

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 5 tabs navigate; both regression routes reachable; active tint correct; stat cards not clipped)

context_for_next_testing_agent: For (tabs) navigation testing on Expo web preview: tabBarTestID does NOT emit data-testid. Use page.get_by_text('Jaap'/'Tracker'/'Videos'/'Insights'/'Settings', exact=True).last.click(force=True). Screen-render indicators used: Jaap=[data-testid="jaap-tap-btn"], Tracker=text matching /Weekly|Monthly|Streak|Calendar|Days/, Videos=[data-testid="video-admin-btn"], Insights=text matching /Total|Weekly|Monthly|Progress|Best/, Settings=text matching /Language|Reminder|Brahmacharya|Notifications|About/. Tab bar bottom sits at y‚âà607 on 375x667 viewport. Admin password: 'naamsmaran-admin'.
rca_of_issue: Root cause: previous (tabs)/_layout.tsx used a fixed height:68 without useSafeAreaInsets(). On Android edge-to-edge and iOS home-indicator devices, the OS gesture bar overlapped the bottom portion of the tab-hit area, causing missed / wrong-tab taps. Fix: switched to insets-aware sizing ‚Äî height = 60 + insets.bottom (min 8px on Android), paddingBottom = insets.bottom ‚Äî so tab hit-area now sits ENTIRELY above the OS gesture bar. Added tabBarHideOnKeyboard, tabBarItemStyle padding, and per-tab tabBarAccessibilityLabel. Verified on web preview: all 5 tabs tap successfully in-order, in random rapid order, and on double-tap; active tint switches correctly; screen content above tab bar; regression routes /write and /video-admin still work with back navigation.
